nasb.text: Then he took the testimony and put it into the ark, and attached the poles to the ark, and put the mercy seat on top of the ark.

esv.text: He took the testimony and put it into the ark, and put the poles on the ark and set the mercy seat above on the ark.

cnv.text: 摩西拿了法版，放在櫃裡，把槓穿在櫃的兩旁，把施恩座安放在約櫃上面。

ccb.text: 他把约版放在约柜里，横杠穿在约柜的两旁，施恩座放在约柜上，
